title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 2 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 2 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 2 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 02/07/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures weakened in the morning but surged significantly in the afternoon. The most-traded contract I2509 closed at722.5, up 1.69% for the day. Traders were actively selling their goods.
